ques: Find a one-way economy flight from Auckland to Honolulu on July 25, 2026, browse the full page and display a flight option with the most stops.
answer: The flight option with the most stops (2 stops) is the Air New Zealand + Fiji Airways one-way itinerary on Sat, Jul 25, 2026: Auckland (AKL) 1:10 PM → Wellington (WLG) [1h50m layover] → Nadi (NAN) [17h35m overnight layover] → Honolulu (HNL) 10:10 PM, total 31 hr, €1,815.
